example-rating.name: example-rating
example-rating.description: Displays a question with a numeric rating scale.

labels.description: Optional labels for min and max endpoints.

multiple-images.name: multiple-images
multiple-images.description: Shows a configurable grid of images with a free-text response box.

images.description: Array of image URLs to display in the grid.

prompt.description: Instructions or question shown above the image grid (HTML allowed).

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the response box.

required.description: If true, participant must enter text before continuing.

columns.description: Number of grid columns. Set to 0 for auto-fit based on image_width.

image_width.description: Width of each image in pixels (also used as min-width for auto-fit).

image_height.description: Height of each image in pixels.
